headline: Principal Financial Group, Inc. (PFG) to Acquire Alabama Dental Network DentaNet
summary: Principal Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:PFG) is among the 12 Best Very Cheap Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 3, Principal Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:PFG) announced that it had entered into a definitive agreement with Southland Benefit Solutions to acquire its single-state dental network, DentaNet. As part of the transaction, Principal will also obtain renewal […]
